evals.prompt: Save this report card PDF for Ava.
evals.expected_output: ingest-document extracts the report-card content; school-doc schema applied; result lands in Ava's education folder with grades, comments, and term tagged.

evals.prompt: Track this permission slip for the field trip on May 5.
evals.expected_output: Permission slip captured with due-date callout and the trip details; routed to the relevant child's education folder.

evals.prompt: Ingest the school newsletter from this URL.
evals.expected_output: ingest-website cleans the newsletter; school-doc schema applied; newsletter saved to the relevant child's education folder (or a school-wide folder).
